calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the state of california's motion for and order striking claim. The motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Docs
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE AND THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
